name: Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones
description: Premium wireless headphones with active noise cancellation. 30-hour battery life, foldable design, and deep bass. Perfect for travel, work, and commuting.

name: Mechanical Gaming Keyboard RGB
description: Compact TKL mechanical keyboard with tactile switches, per-key RGB backlighting, and durable aluminium frame. Great for gaming and programming.

name: Smart Watch Fitness Tracker
description: Track steps, heart rate, sleep quality, and more. Waterproof design with multi-day battery. Pairs with iOS and Android.

name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: 360° sound, IPX7 waterproof, and long battery life. Loud, clear audio for outdoors and home use.

name: USB-C Hub 7-in-1 Adapter
description: HDMI 4K, USB-A ports, SD reader, and 100W PD pass-through — all from one USB-C port.

name: Laptop Stand Adjustable Aluminium
description: Ergonomic folding aluminium stand with adjustable height. Improves posture and airflow.

name: Webcam 4K Ultra HD with Mic
description: Sharp 4K video for meetings and streaming. Built-in noise-cancelling microphone with autofocus.

name: Ergonomic Wireless Mouse
description: Sculpted for comfort with silent clicks and precision tracking. Reliable wireless connectivity.
